title: Rose and patchouli scented candle soy wax Rose and patchouli with essential oils in amber glass votive jar with lid,100% Vegan fragrance topped with roses petals
description: soy wax candle fragranced with Rose and patchouli scented candle. This is a luxury candle. The 100% vegan candle is fragranced with essential oils. Presented in an amber glass votive. This rustic candle looks truly beautiful. With a rustic style, the blush pink label is inspired by a trip to Paris. With a pretty floral print and botanical styling this makes a great gift set. This candle is hand mixed and hand poured and made with eco friendly soywax. The wax is 100% vegan. Fragranced with essential oils. This scented candle is fragrance with rose and patchouli to give a beautiful home fragrance. STYLE - PARISIAN BOTANICAL NATURAL CANDLE CANDLE VESSEL - AMBER GLASS JAR WITH LID (120ML) SCENT - ESSENTIAL OILS - PATCHOULI + ROSE PETAL All of our candles are ethical. Not tested on animals Petroleum free. Pthathalate free. Made in the UK. Artisan candles.
